summary.summary: Product-minded engineer and executive with deep experience building clean-energy systems, autonomous robotics, safety-critical platforms, and applied AI tools. Known for translating ambitious technical ideas into working prototypes, scalable production programs, and cross-functional teams that can move quickly without losing sight of reliability, ethics, or user impact.

experience.title: Founder & Chief Technology Officer
experience.description:
• Led a multidisciplinary engineering organization across energy storage, autonomous systems, materials research, and human-machine interfaces.
• Shifted the company portfolio toward clean-energy infrastructure and civilian technology while maintaining strict internal safety reviews.
• Built rapid prototyping workflows that reduced concept-to-field validation cycles from months to weeks.

experience.title: Principal Systems Architect
experience.description:
• Designed integrated hardware and software platforms for high-risk environments, emphasizing redundancy, diagnostics, and operator feedback.
• Partnered with manufacturing, legal, and field teams to convert prototype lessons into documented engineering standards.
• Mentored senior engineers on architecture reviews, test planning, and failure-mode analysis.

projects.title: Arc Reactor Energy Platform
projects.description:
• Developed a compact clean-energy platform for high-output applications with strict reliability and containment targets.
• Coordinated simulation, materials testing, and hardware validation to improve energy density while reducing maintenance complexity.

projects.title: JARVIS Operations Assistant
projects.description:
• Built an AI-assisted operations layer for scheduling, design review, lab monitoring, and real-time decision support.
• Added explainable alerts and human approval gates for actions that touched safety, finance, or external communications.

projects.title: Autonomous Lab Fabrication System
projects.description:
• Created a robotics-assisted fabrication workflow that translated design changes into repeatable lab builds.
• Improved prototype traceability by logging material batches, machine settings, inspection notes, and operator approvals.

subsections.Research Focus: Power systems, autonomous control, human-computer interaction, and advanced manufacturing.
subsections.Honors: Undergraduate research fellow, robotics laboratory contributor, early prototype showcase finalist.
